title: (Bearish Signal) DAVA, RSI Indicator left the overbought zone on Oct 28, 2020
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that DAVA's price could be shifting from an uptrend to a downtrend. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. Tickeon A.I.dvisor looked back and found 19 similar cases where DAVA's RSI Indicator left the overbought zone, and in 16 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 84%. Current price $63.77 is above $55.64 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 09/28/20 - 10/28/20, the price experienced a +8% Uptrend, while the week of 10/21/20 - 10/28/20 shows a -2% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/1rcja0pf82w51.png?width=1529&format=png&auto=webp&s=05381f752b1c9305ea03a72a82f2b7d224f71e7c

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator may be shifting from an upward trend to a downward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 18 of 32 cases where DAVA's Stochastic Oscillator exited the overbought zone, the price fell further within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 56%.

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on October 28, 2020. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on DAVA as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 25 of 43 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 58%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram (MACD) for DAVA turned negative on October 15, 2020. This could be a sign that the stock is set to turn lower in the coming weeks. Traders may want to sell the stock or buy put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 19 similar instances when the indicator turned negative. In 13 of the 19 cases the stock turned lower in the days that followed. This puts the odds of success at 68%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where Apple declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 71%.

DAVA broke above its upper Bollinger Band on October 01, 2020. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.
